use_cases: Navigation menus with animated text roll effect on hover
Header navigation links with character-by-character reveal animation
Interactive menu items for modern web applications
ai_summary: A text roll navigation component that creates a smooth character-by-character animation effect on hover using Framer Motion. The text splits into two overlapping layers that animate in opposite directions, creating a roll/reveal effect. Ideal for modern navigation bars in SaaS applications and portfolio sites looking for interactive hover states.
